/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -g -O0 -Wno-unused-parameter "CMakeFiles/execution-manager.dir/src/main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/execution-manager.dir/src/execution_manager.c.o" "CMakeFiles/execution-manager.dir/src/schedule.c.o" "CMakeFiles/execution-manager.dir/src/app_task.c.o" -o execution-manager  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgio-2.0.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libglib-2.0.so
